Package
Description
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls
JavaFX controls and fluent builders for dialogs and panes.

  • Uses of TableViewOptions.Option in com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

    Fields in com.dua3.utility.fx.controls declared as TableViewOptions.Option
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final TableViewOptions.Option
    TableViewOptions.ALLOW_DELETING_ROWS
    Allow deleting rows.
    static final TableViewOptions.Option
    TableViewOptions.EDITABLE
    Make the TableView editable.
    static final TableViewOptions.Option
    TableViewOptions.MULTIPLE_ROWS_SELECTABLE
    Allow selecting multiple rows at once.
    static final TableViewOptions.Option
    TableViewOptions.REORDERABLE_COLUMNS
    Allow dragging columns for reordering.
    static final TableViewOptions.Option
    TableViewOptions.REORDERABLE_ROWS
    Allow dragging rows for reordering.
    static final TableViewOptions.Option
    TableViewOptions.SORTABLE
    Make the TableView sortable by clicking on a column header.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <S> TableViewOptions.Option
    TableViewOptions.ALLOW_INSERTING_ROWS(Supplier<S> itemFactory)
    Allow inserting rows.
    Methods in com.dua3.utility.fx.controls with parameters of type TableViewOptions.Option
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    TableViewOptions.isEnabled(TableViewOptions.Option option)
    Checks if the specified option is enabled for this table view configuration.
    static TableViewOptions
    TableViewOptions.of(TableViewOptions.Option... options)
    Creates an instance of TableViewOptions by combining the specified options.
    TableViewOptions
    TableViewOptions.with(TableViewOptions.Option... options)
    Creates a new TableViewOptions instance by combining the current options with the specified additional options.
    TableViewOptions
    TableViewOptions.without(TableViewOptions.Option... options)
    Creates a new TableViewOptions instance by disabling the specified options in the current configuration.
